positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The mountains should feature sharp, geometric peaks rendered in deep indigo, cyan, and emerald green, contrasted against a gradient sky of warm peach and soft orange. In the foreground, add minimalist, silhouetted elements of pine trees and a flowing river, using a limited palette of black and deep blue. The overall style must be modern vector art, clean and crisp, designed for screen printing on fabric. Ensure strong central composition with excellent negative space for typography placement. High contrast, dramatic lighting, print-ready, perfect for merchandise.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, amateur drawing, photorealistic, cartoon, grainy
